summary: AI-powered clothing pairing application that analyzes photos of clothes and suggests matching outfit combinations
architectural_notes: Camera integration for capturing clothing photos
Image recognition/AI model for clothing analysis
Outfit pairing algorithm based on color, style, and clothing type
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Fashion hanger icon illustration in warm terracotta color (hanger-icon.dim_120x120.png)
- Outfit pairing placeholder image showing two clothing item silhouettes side by side in sage green (outfit-placeholder.dim_400x300.png)
- Upload clothing hero banner with minimalist wardrobe aesthetic in cream and warm brown tones (upload-hero.dim_1200x400.png)

existing_features.title: Create a photo upload interface that allows users to capture or select photos of individual clothing items from their device
Display a gallery view of all uploaded clothing items organized by category or upload date
Create an outfit suggestions view that displays recommended clothing pairs with visual previews showing both items side by side

Design a modern, fashion-forward visual theme with warm earth tones (terracotta, sage green, cream, warm browns) and elegant typography that reflects style consciousness and wardrobe organization, with a clean, magazine-inspired layout that emphasizes visual content

new_feature_requests.summary: Analyze clothing photos and suggest matching outfit pairs
Store uploaded clothing item photos in the backend with metadata including upload timestamp and user identifier
Implement backend logic to analyze clothing photos and generate outfit pairing suggestions based on color compatibility, clothing type, and style matching

Implement a matching algorithm that considers complementary colors, appropriate clothing combinations (tops with bottoms, outerwear with base layers), and generates the maximum number of valid outfit pairs from the available wardrobe
